audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a clear and steady pace, and no noticeable background noise or emotional inflection.
temporal_description: Two men in formal attire stand facing each other in an indoor setting with glass doors and a monitor in the background. The man on the left, wearing a light-colored shirt and tie, has his head slightly lowered and remains mostly still. The man on the right, dressed in a white shirt with a lanyard and dark tie, stands upright and appears to be speaking, occasionally shifting his gaze. A third person is partially visible in the foreground, looking downward. The scene is dimly lit, with reflections visible on the glass doors behind them.
